query: CREATE TABLE `articles` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `title` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `meta_description` text NOT NULL, `og_title` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `og_description` text NOT NULL, `category` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `tags` json NOT NULL, `image_alt` text NOT NULL, `reading_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 7, `author` varchar(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'The Oracle Lover', `status` enum('queued','published') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued', `published_at` timestamp NULL, `last_modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `word_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hero_url` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `asins_used` json NOT NULL, `internal_links_used` json NOT NULL, `body` longtext NOT NULL, `tldr` text NOT NULL, `opener` enum('gut-punch','question','story','counterintuitive') NOT NULL, `conclusion` enum('cta','reflection','question','challenge','benediction') NOT NULL, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `articles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `articles_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2tKWhLLrm4qtwFR.a86ae6d39ff1 --database giES5D3NCtGvLGR7vYz5rT --execute CREATE TABLE `articles` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `title` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `meta_description` text NOT NULL, `og_title` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `og_description` text NOT NULL, `category` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `tags` json NOT NULL, `image_alt` text NOT NULL, `reading_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 7, `author` varchar(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'The Oracle Lover', `status` enum('queued','published') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued', `published_at` timestamp NULL, `last_modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `word_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hero_url` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `asins_used` json NOT NULL, `internal_links_used` json NOT NULL, `body` longtext NOT NULL, `tldr` text NOT NULL, `opener` enum('gut-punch','question','story','counterintuitive') NOT NULL, `conclusion` enum('cta','reflection','question','challenge','benediction') NOT NULL, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `articles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `articles_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`));
